items.name: network_attck_detection
items.description: *NetGuard AI** is an enterprise-grade, machine learning-based framework for detecting and monitoring Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks in real-time. The system combines advanced feature engineering with a Random Forest classifier to analyze network traffic and identify attack patterns with good accuracy on test datasets.

items.name: FinSight-AI
items.description: FinSight AI is a premium financial intelligence application featuring automated transaction classification, real-time transaction anomaly detection, and predictive cash flow forecasting. It is built using Django REST Framework for the core API, FastAPI for the Machine Learning service, and React (Vite + TypeScript) for the frontend dashboard.

items.name: AI-Enhanced-Intrusion-Detection-System
items.description: The AI-Enhanced Intrusion Detection System is a smart, automated framework built using machine learning algorithms to monitor and secure network environments against intrusions and cyberattacks

items.name: PhiFlow
items.description: A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

items.name: Machine-Learning-Portfolio
items.description: End-to-end Machine Learning portfolio bridging foundational math and industrial frameworks. Documenting a hands-on progression from scratch-built optimization algorithms (Gradient Descent) to production-ready Scikit-Learn pipelines. Built with an inquisitive, "no black boxes" engineering mindset.

items.name: Chetan3110
items.description: This repository showcases my personal and professional projects, where I explore various technologies, tools, and frameworks. It contains a variety of coding experiments, full-stack machine learning applications, and automation solutions that I have built and continue to improve.

items.name: Capstone_project-2_PG
items.description: Explainable malware detection framework using feature-engineered Portable Executable (PE) metadata and Machine Learning/Deep Neural Networks. The system classifies files as malicious or benign with up to 99% accuracy using Random Forest, while SHAP-based explainability reveals key decision factors and supports scalable large-scale analysis.

items.name: Climate-Change-Carbon-Emission-Pollution-Prediction-ML
items.description: Machine Learning and Deep Learning framework for forecasting climate change indicators, carbon emissions, and environmental pollution using Random Forest, XGBoost, Bi-LSTM, and Hybrid Ensemble Models.

items.description: Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)

items.description: A benchmark and research framework for uncertainty quantification in scientific machine learning and neural operators. Evaluates calibration, coverage, OOD detection, active learning, and long-horizon rollout reliability across FNOs, DeepONets, PINNs, and surrogate models.

items.description: Machine learning framework for classifying coffee samples and detecting adulteration using Raman spectroscopy.

items.name: A-Decentralized-IoT-and-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Hyperlocal-Cloudburst-Prediction
items.description: A decentralized IoT + Machine Learning system for hyperlocal cloudburst/landslide risk prediction. ESP32 sensor nodes (soil moisture, rainfall, DHT11) transmit over LoRa and WiFi-UDP to a Flask server running a RandomForest classifier, with real-time MySQL logging, a live web dashboard, and Blynk/GSM/buzzer field alerts.

The system analyzes solar panel images through Computer Vision and Machine Learning techniques to detect structural defects and performance degradation.

It uses Explainable AI to show why predictions are made, audits models for hidden bias, applies fairness improvements, and generates counterfactual explanations. The system helps ensure AI decisions are understandable, accountable, and trustworthy.
